testcase.name: Módulos Financieros - Carga de páginas › Family Office Dashboard carga con quick navigation

failure.message: financial-360-connectivity.spec.ts:61:7 Family Office Dashboard carga con quick navigation

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › financial-360-connectivity.spec.ts:61:7 › Módulos Financieros - Carga de páginas › Family Office Dashboard carga con quick navigation
Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded.
Error: page.waitForLoadState: Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded.
61 | test('Family Office Dashboard carga con quick navigation', async ({ page }) => { 62 | await page.goto(`${BASE_URL}/family-office/dashboard`); > 63 | await page.waitForLoadState('networkidle'); | ^ 64 | 65 | await expect(page.locator('text=Dashboard Patrimonial')).toBeVisible({ timeout: 10000 }); 66 | at /workspace/tests/financial-360-connectivity.spec.ts:63:16

testcase.name: Módulos Financieros - Carga de páginas › Family Office Cuentas - botón Conectar banco funciona
Conectividad entre módulos › Cuadro de Mandos → Family Office
Conectividad entre módulos › Family Office Dashboard → PE
testcase.failure:

testcase.failure:
